title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Container Corporation of India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Container Corporation of India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Container Corporation of India family as a Fleet Manager in Coimbatore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Container Corporation of India:
Container Corporation of India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Container Corporation of India!
